## reference · Goal Gradient Effect

* The closer users are to completing a task, the faster they work towards reaching it.
* Providing artificial progress towards a goal increases motivation to complete that task.
* Clear indication of progress motivates users to complete tasks.
* Goal-gradient effect: tendency to approach a goal increases with proximity to the goal.

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/goal-gradient-effect/
